_publications._publicationTitle: Cell-free DNA ultra-low-pass whole genome sequencing to distinguish malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST) from its benign precursor lesion: A cross-sectional study.

_contextSnippet: Genomic copy number analysis of plasma cfDNA revealed that focal somatic CNAs that have previously been associated with PN tumor progression in NF1 patients were prominently observed in MPNST patients
details: Successfully quantified copy number alterations and estimated tumor fractions from plasma cfDNA samples
